text:
Created attachment 247929
update 2.3.2 and solve a mandoc issue (see PR 276592 )

According to a patch suggestion in

Bug 276592 - devel/ocl-icd add respecting of DOCS and MANPAGES knobs for do-build

include the patch provided and update, while here, to ocl-icd 2.3.2.
